title: Topper
description: Another leaderboard plugin with better features and performance
body:
# Info
This is another leaderboard plugin that stores values from various providers. Lightweight & Performance are all it has. Other features may you see in other plugins.
​
# Story
I had used a lot of leaderboard plugins. Some had fulfilled my needs, but one problem was either the plugin is not in a good shape (bad performance, crashing my server, etc.) or it is a paid one with bloated features. Therefore, I created this plugin for my server, and then shared it here.
​
# Feature
- Friendly for servers of any size
- Lightweight
- Leaderboard
- Placeholders
- Support YAML, JSON, SQLITE & MYSQL storage
